metrolink: On Thursday 11th and Friday 12th June The Weeknd plays at Etihad Stadium. Services will be busier than usual so please plan your journey in advance.
headlines: KPMG's AI report becomes an accidental demo of AI hallucinations
Novo Nordisk reports cyberattack as UK gives Wegovy pill the nod
Amazon owns up to using 2.5bn gallons of H2O in its bit barns last year
Microsoft has mostly repaired flaw in Surface hardware that allowed unprotected devices to be bricked by a single packet
crew_quote: "What’s the weather like, then? Well, not as hot as my curry last night—now that was a scorcher, even at twenty degrees!"
